summary: Frontend-only testing of 2 P2 features: (1) References tab grouping by BOQ Item No., (2) Pan/zoom view state persistence via localStorage. Found and FIXED a race-condition bug in pan/zoom restore. Both features now verified working. Export Full Report also verified (double-underscore filename fix confirmed). All prior regression flows pass.

minor.issue: On test start, backend was FATAL due to corrupted venv: /root/.venv/bin/uvicorn was all null-bytes (300 null bytes). Fixed by reinstalling packages with base Python (/usr/local/bin/python3.11 -m pip install -r requirements.txt --target) and recreating the uvicorn script. Root cause: disk write error corrupted the venv binary in place.

ui_bugs.component: ReferencesPanel.js - Two ambiguous '(No BOQ Item)' group headers
ui_bugs.issue: In Civil Arc project, two separate group header rows both display '(No BOQ Item)' — one for marks linked to a BOQ row that has no item_no (rowId=6a17172d51a683d0f6f8d103), and one for marks with no boq_row_id at all (rowId=__none__). Users see two identically-labeled groups with no way to distinguish which is 'linked but unnamed' vs 'unlinked'. Suggestion: for the linked-but-unnamed group, show e.g. 'BOQ Row (No Item No.)' or include a row index.

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: BUG: When reopening the drawing modal, zoom always reset to 100% despite localStorage having the saved value. Root cause: the persist useEffect (400ms debounce) fires on component mount with initial zoom=1.0, and the async PDF load takes ~4 seconds. At t=400ms, the persist timer fires and OVERWRITES the saved zoom (e.g. 1.2) with 1.0. At t=4000ms, loadDrawing reads localStorage and gets 1.0 (already overwritten).
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Moved the localStorage restore block from inside the try{...} after PDF rendering to BEFORE the async fetch at the very top of loadDrawing. This causes React to re-render immediately with the correct zoom, the persist useEffect re-runs and cancels the initial 1.0 timer, replacing it with the correct value.

references_grouping.no_boq_group: PASS - data-testid='ref-group-__none__' present for unlinked marks

pan_zoom_persistence.localStorage_save: PASS - qto_view_{id} saved with {zoom:1.2, pan:{x:0,y:0}} after 400ms
pan_zoom_persistence.restore_on_reopen: PASS (after fix) - zoom 120% correctly restored on modal reopen
pan_zoom_persistence.fresh_drawing_default: PASS - new drawings default to zoom=1.0, pan={x:0,y:0}

export_full_report.button_state: PASS - shows 'Building PDF…', disabled during generation
export_full_report.previous_bug_fixed: PASS - pdfReport.js .trim() before sanitize prevents double-underscore

action_items: OPTIONAL: Differentiate the 'linked BOQ row with no item_no' group label from the 'unlinked marks' group in ReferencesPanel — currently both show '(No BOQ Item)'. Consider showing 'Row N (No Item No.)' or adding the row's description when item_no is empty.

OPTIONAL: The canvas mark edit-on-click test could not be run via Playwright because the canvas CSS dimensions (3672x2517) overflow the 1920x1080 viewport. Manual test recommended if canvas edit regression needs re-verification.
critical_code_review_comments: DrawingMeasurement.js: Pan/zoom restore was placed AFTER the async PDF render (lines 95-106 in original), creating a race condition with the persist useEffect. Fixed by moving restore to the start of loadDrawing.
ReferencesPanel.js: Line 80 - filtering groups with marks.length > 0 is correct. Groups without marks (BOQ rows with no linked marks) are excluded cleanly.
pdfReport.js: Line 179 - `.trim().replace(...)` correctly prevents 'Civil_Arc__FullReport.pdf' double-underscore by removing trailing spaces from projectName before sanitizing.

pdfReport.js: groupMap uses item_no as key (not row.id). If two different BOQ rows have the same item_no, their marks would merge into one group. ReferencesPanel.js uses row.id as key - these two implementations are intentionally different (PDF groups by item_no for display; panel groups by row ID for accuracy).

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only test; backend was revived from corrupted venv)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on all tested features (grouping, pan/zoom, export, regression)

seed_data_creation: None - test-modified item_no ('TEST-001') was immediately reverted
context_for_next_testing_agent: Civil Arc project: 12 marks, 2 BOQ rows (both with empty item_no). References panel shows 2 groups both labeled '(No BOQ Item)' - group 1 (2 marks: REF-011, REF-012 linked to row 6a17172d51a683d0f6f8d103) and group 2 (10 marks: REF-001..010 with no boq_row_id). Canvas 3672x2517 at CSS pos x=642, y=114. Drawing ID: 6a15af427bea5eefb7a8e92d. pdfReport.js double-underscore bug is fixed. Pan/zoom race condition is fixed. Backend venv was corrupted (9496 null-byte files) and was repaired by reinstalling packages with base Python.
rca_of_issue: Pan/zoom persistence bug RCA: DrawingMeasurement.js had a race condition. On mount: (1) persist useEffect runs immediately with zoom=1.0 and sets a 400ms timer; (2) loadDrawing starts an async PDF fetch (~4 seconds). At t=400ms: the persist timer fires and saves {zoom:1.0} to localStorage, overwriting the previously saved {zoom:1.2}. At t=4000ms: loadDrawing reads localStorage and gets {zoom:1.0} (already overwritten), then calls setZoom(1.0), keeping it at default. Fix: moved localStorage read+setZoom to the very beginning of loadDrawing (before async fetch) so React re-renders with zoom=1.2 immediately; the persist useEffect cancels the {zoom:1.0} timer and replaces with {zoom:1.2}.
